scrape.description:
Fam Property is proud to introduce an extraordinary 6 bedroom ultra luxury villa in The Oasis Mirage, the latest and most prestigious development in Emaar s iconic Dubailand community. Designed for discerning homeowners who seek unparalleled elegance, privacy, and exclusivity, this magnificent villa is a true masterpiece of architecture and sophistication. 

Property Details:

Type: 6 Bedroom Villa
Layout: 4 Levels (including Basement & Rooftop)
Built Up Area: 15,757 sq. ft. 
Key Features:

Grand living spaces with finely crafted interiors
Expansive terrace with panoramic views
Private infinity pool & lush landscaped garden
Dedicated staff quarters & spacious garage
Bespoke finishes and contemporary design

Exclusive Features & Amenities:

Waterfront Living
Wellness & Leisure
Fitness & Sports
Family Friendly
Retail & Dining
Green Living
Premium Gated Community

Prime Location & Connectivity:

Downtown Dubai 20 minutes
Dubai Marina 20 minutes
DXB International Airport 30 minutes
DWC Airport 25 minutes

Experience the pinnacle of luxury waterfront living at The Oasis Mirage. This is more than a home it's a statement of prestige, designed for those who seek grandeur, serenity, and the finest lifestyle Dubai has to offer.
scrape.listing_title: Big Plot | Investor Deal | Next to Amenities
